While we’ve seen this laptop go for less last year, today’s deal marks the lowest price we have tracked for it since the price hike. It’s a pretty good option to consider if you’re looking to buy a new gaming laptop, which is also great for day-to-day usage, and you can learn more about it below.

The apps await below.

items.title: Save 50% on the popular Ring Outdoor Stick Up Cam with battery at a new $40 low
items.summary:
Amazon is now offering a new low price on the popular Ring Outdoor Stick Up Cam with battery for $39.99 shipped. Down from $80 here, we’ve seen discounts previously drop the costs as low as $50 up until today. Now, while this deal lasts, you’re getting a larger-than-ever 50% markdown that cuts $40 off the tag for a new all-time low price. You can also find a huge array of alternate cameras, doorbells, and lights at discounted rates in the official Amazon storefront here.

items.title: Add two Anker Qi2 MagSafe charging pucks to your space at just $12 each today
items.summary:
Anker Zolo Qi2 MagSafe Charging Pucks (2-pack)

Buy for $24 (Reg. $30+)

What we love

This Anker 15W Qi2 Zolo MagSafe-compatible charger offers wireless charging for iPhones and other Qi2 devices in a compact puck design with a built-in 5-foot cable. Sure, faster 22.5W Qi2.2 chargers are already on the market, but 15W is still plenty for most setups – and this 2-pack deal at just $12 per puck is very easy to recommend.

items.title: This AI weather startup is out-forecasting government agencies
items.summary: WindBorne benefits from its unique combination of model-building and data collection. The company now has about 400 balloons in flight gathering sensor readings at any given time, launched from 15 sites around the globe. The advances in its current model come from improvements in how the data collected by the balloons is fed into the models.

items.title: Strava declares war on scrapers ahead of IPO
items.summary: To stop scraping, the company is increasing security around its website and will now only allow authenticated users to view certain data. Earlier, users were able to see details like public profiles and fitness club listings without logging in. The company is putting all that data behind authentication to protect it from unauthorized AI scraping.
